message:
🌱 Add modelpack: RFC Model annotation and config guidelines mission (#822)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "modelpack-19-rfc-model-annotation-and-config-guidelines",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "modelpack: [RFC] Model annotation and config guidelines",
+    "description": "[RFC] Model annotation and config guidelines. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current modelpack deployment",
+        "description": "Review the modelpack model-spec repository and its OCI manifest structure:
```bash
# Clone the model-spec repo
git clone https://github.com/modelpack/model-spec.git
cd model-spec
```
This issue is about annotation vs config guidelines for the Model Spec, not a Kubernetes deployment."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review modelpack configuration",
+        "description": "Review how model metadata is currently defined:

Modelpack uses OCI image manifests to package ML models. Currently, model general information (name, author, creation time, etc.) is stored as annotations. The RFC proposes guidelines for when to use annotations vs structured config files."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [RFC] Model annotation and config guidelines",
+        "description": "The fix establishes guidelines for annotation vs config usage:

- If a description belongs to a **specific layer**, it SHOULD be an annotation
- If a description describes a **general property** of the model, it SHOULD be in a config

A `ModelFS` structure is also introduced to describe the ordering of multiple files within model layers.

See the fix PR for details: https://github.com/modelpack/model-spec/pull/25"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Verify the guidelines are applied correctly by checking example model manifests:
```bash
# Inspect a model manifest to verify annotation/config separation
oras manifest fetch <registry>/<repo>:<tag> | jq '.config.mediaType'

# Verify model config contains general properties
oras blob fetch <registry>/<repo>@<config-digest> | jq .
```
Confirm that layer-specific metadata uses annotations while model-wide properties use the config."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Right now we define a lot of model general information as annotations. They should be defined as a field of model config.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "{
  "schemaVersion": 2,
  "mediaType": "application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json",
  "artifactType": "application/vnd.cnai.model.manifest.v1+json",
  "config": {
    "mediaType": "application/vnd.oci.empty.v1+json",
    "digest": "sha256:44136fa355b3678a1146ad16f7e8649e94fb4fc21fe77e8310c060f61caaff8a",
    "size": 2
  },
  "layers": [
    {
      "mediaType": "application/vnd.oci.image.layer.v1.tar",
      "digest": "sha256:e258d248fda94c63753607f7c4494ee0fcbe92f1a76bfdac795c9d84101eb317",
      "size": 1234
    },
    {
      "mediaType": "application/vnd.oci.image.layer.v1.tar",
      "digest": "sha256:e258d248fda94c63753607f7c4494ee0fcbe92f1a76bfdac795c9d84101eb317",
      "size": 2345
    }
  ]
}",
+        "{
  "schemaVersion": 2,
  "mediaType": "application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json",
  "artifactType": "application/vnd.cnai.model.manifest.v1+json",
  "config": {
    "mediaType": "application/vnd.cnai.model.config.v1.tar+gzip",
    "digest": "sha256:5891b5b522d5df086d0ff0b110fbd9d21bb4fc7163af34d08286a2e846f6be03",
    "size": 1234
  },
  "layers": [
    {
      "mediaType": "application/vnd.cnai.model.layer.v1.tar",
      "digest": "sha256:e258d248fda94c63753607f7c4494ee0fcbe92f1a76bfdac795c9d84101eb317",
      "size": 2345
    }
  ]
}",
+        "{
  "schemaVersion": 2,
  "config": {
    "mediaType": "application/vnd.cncf.helm.config.v1+json",
    "digest": "sha256:34bf03806938a59ee7dc3e2c33e314d0eaef573313ff9dcc677113502d568523",
    "size": 145
  },
  "layers": [
    {
      "mediaType": "application/vnd.cncf.helm.chart.content.v1.tar+gzip",
      "digest": "sha256:87a12bc6175d031e6b0077f73d6db045967a2fc0cb29d98cb384f937953e3843",
      "size": 4172
    }
  ],
  "annotations": {
    "org.opencontainers.image.created": "2024-12-17T20:10:50Z",
    "org.opencontainers.image.description": "A Helm chart for Kubernetes",
    "org.opencontainers.image.title": "hello-world",
    "org.opencontainers.image.version": "0.1.0"
  }
}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "modelpack",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "modelpack"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/modelpack/model-spec/issues/19",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/modelpack/model-spec",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/modelpack/model-spec/pull/25"
+    },
+    "reactions": 1,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "oras"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working ORAS CLI installation and access to an OCI-compliant registry for testing model artifacts."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:38:47.876Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,

+}
